<!doctype html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Tontine — Des petits enfants de MONGO & NJOUME</title>
<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/react@18/umd/react.production.min.js" crossorigin></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/react-dom@18/umd/react-dom.production.min.js" crossorigin></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/@babel/standalone/babel.min.js"></script>
<style>
  html, body, #root { height: 100%; margin: 0; }
  body { background: #0000; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="root"></div>
<script type="text/babel" data-presets="react">
const { useState, useMemo } = React;

// --- Wrapper générique pour les icônes Lucide (chargées via CDN) ---
function LucideIcon({ node, size = 24, color = "currentColor", strokeWidth = 2, style }) {
  const attrs = {
    width: size, height: size, viewBox: "0 0 24 24", fill: "none",
    stroke: color, strokeWidth: strokeWidth, strokeLinecap: "round",
    strokeLinejoin: "round", style: style,
  };
  const children = (node || []).map((item, i) => {
    const tag = item[0], a = item[1];
    if (tag === "path") return React.createElement("path", { key: i, d: a.d });
    if (tag === "circle") return React.createElement("circle", { key: i, cx: a.cx, cy: a.cy, r: a.r });
    if (tag === "line") return React.createElement("line", { key: i, x1: a.x1, y1: a.y1, x2: a.x2, y2: a.y2 });
    if (tag === "rect") return React.createElement("rect", { key: i, x: a.x, y: a.y, width: a.width, height: a.height, rx: a.rx });
    if (tag === "polyline") return React.createElement("polyline", { key: i, points: a.points });
    if (tag === "polygon") return React.createElement("polygon", { key: i, points: a.points });
    if (tag === "ellipse") return React.createElement("ellipse", { key: i, cx: a.cx, cy: a.cy, rx: a.rx, ry: a.ry });
    return null;
  });
  return React.createElement("svg", attrs, children);
}
function makeIcon(name) {
  return function (props) {
    const node = (window.lucide && window.lucide[name]) || [];
    return React.createElement(LucideIcon, Object.assign({ node }, props));
  };
}
const Check = makeIcon("Check");
const Clock = makeIcon("Clock");
const Wallet = makeIcon("Wallet");
const Users = makeIcon("Users");
const Home = makeIcon("Home");
const Calendar = makeIcon("Calendar");
const Landmark = makeIcon("Landmark");
const Megaphone = makeIcon("Megaphone");
const AlertTriangle = makeIcon("AlertTriangle");
const ArrowDownCircle = makeIcon("ArrowDownCircle");
const PiggyBank = makeIcon("PiggyBank");
const BellRing = makeIcon("BellRing");
const BellOff = makeIcon("BellOff");
const HandCoins = makeIcon("HandCoins");


// ---- Design tokens (wax-fabric inspired) ----
const C = {
  indigoDeep: "#1B1F4B",
  indigoMid: "#2D3A7C",
  marigold: "#E8A33D",
  marigoldLight: "#F4C873",
  waxRed: "#C1432E",
  waxGreen: "#2F6E51",
  ivory: "#F7EEDD",
  paper: "#FFFDF8",
  ink: "#221D1D",
  inkSoft: "#6B6458",
  momo: "#FFCC00",
  orangeMoney: "#FF6600",
};

const AVATAR_PALETTE = [
  "#C1432E", "#2F6E51", "#2D3A7C", "#E8A33D",
  "#8C4A2F", "#3E7C7C", "#B8722E", "#5C4A8C",
  "#A6572C", "#4A7A3E", "#6B3F6B", "#B08A2E",
];

// Membres réels de la Tontine, rangés dans l'ordre des bénéficiaires
// (mai → mars). Djene Marielle (taux forfaitaire) placée en dernier
// car elle ne bénéficie jamais de la cagnotte.
// photo : URL/chemin de la photo du membre — null tant qu'elle n'a
// pas été fournie (repli automatique sur les initiales).
// senior: true = aîné(e), false = cadet(te), relatif à Patrick Essake,
// administrateur de l'App et commissaire aux comptes de la Tontine —
// il est le point de référence, donc non concerné par aîné/cadet
// (senior: null, admin: true).
const FAMILY = [
  { nom: "Moussongo", prenom: "Marie", gender: "F", senior: true, momo: "MTN", paid: true, photo: null },
  { nom: "Essake", prenom: "Patrick", gender: "M", senior: null, admin: true, momo: "Orange", paid: true, photo: "data:image/jpeg;base64,
